response.overview: A fake documentary-style film submitted to the Gimme Truth! 2026 Competition at the True/False Film Festival in Columbia Missouri. “I Blame Chalamet” recounts Luke’s awful first date in high school that ended in ice cream induced vomit all over the date’s car. The premise of the movie is to determine whether or not they are telling the truth- is this story fiction or did Luke really have to live through that experience?
response.title: I Blame Chalamet
